task_prompt:
Diagnose the failure in the provided workspace. A metagenomic plasmid analysis
cannot proceed because of a missing input. Identify the missing input,
specify the affected sample_id, the missing field, the incorrect path,
and suggest a minimal safe fix.

agent_profile.rule: Same as G3 ABI Control Layer but structured error_code and diagnostic_hints are not returned. Tests whether diagnostic hints contribute to fault localization ability.
